;(function(){

    if (Module._load && Module._load.__cfViHostPrelude) return;

    var languageMode = 'vi';
    var FOLLOW_RULE_MARKER = '__VIET_FOLLOW_USER_LANGUAGE__';

    function normalizeMode(lang) {
      return lang === 'zh' || lang === 'en' || lang === 'vi' ? lang : 'vi';
    }

    function setLanguageMode(lang) {
      languageMode = normalizeMode(lang);
    }

    function hasVietnamese(text) {
      return /[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵèéẹẻẽêềếệểễìíịỉĩòóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡùúụủũưừứựửữỳýỵỷỹđĐ]/i.test(text || '');
    }

    function hasChinese(text) {
      return /[\u3400-\u9FFF\uF900-\uFAFF]/.test(text || '');
    }

    function hasEnglish(text) {
      return /[A-Za-z]/.test(text || '');
    }

    var phraseVi = [

    ];

    var phraseEn = [

    ];

    function applyPhrases(text, list) {
      var out = text;
      for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) out = out.replace(list[i][0], list[i][1]);
      return out;
    }

    function translateText(text) {
      if (typeof text !== 'string') return text;
      var raw = text;
      var lead = (raw.match(/^\s*/) || [''])[0];
      var tail = (raw.match(/\s*$/) || [''])[0];
      var core = raw.trim();
      if (!core || languageMode === 'zh') return raw;
      var dict = languageMode === 'en' ? dictEn : dictVi;
      var phrases = languageMode === 'en' ? phraseEn : phraseVi;
      if (dict[core]) return lead + dict[core] + tail;
      var out = applyPhrases(core, phrases);
      if (dict[out]) out = dict[out];
      return lead + out + tail;
    }

    function translateItems(items) {
      if (!Array.isArray(items)) return { mapped: items, map: {} };
      var map = {};
      var mapped = items.map(function(item) {
        if (typeof item === 'string') {
          var translated = translateText(item);
          if (translated !== item) map[translated] = item;
          return translated;
        }
        if (item && typeof item === 'object') {
          var clone = {};
          for (var key in item) clone[key] = item[key];
          if (typeof clone.title === 'string') clone.title = translateText(clone.title);
          if (typeof clone.tooltip === 'string') clone.tooltip = translateText(clone.tooltip);
          if (typeof clone.detail === 'string') clone.detail = translateText(clone.detail);
          if (typeof clone.message === 'string') clone.message = translateText(clone.message);
          return clone;
        }
        return item;
      });
      return { mapped: mapped, map: map };
    }

    function addTranslateConnectSrc(csp) {
      var allow = ' https://translate.googleapis.com https://translate.google.com';
      if (/connect-src/i.test(csp)) {
        return csp.replace(/connect-src([^;]*)/i, function(all, rest) {
          return /translate\.googleapis\.com|translate\.google\.com/i.test(rest) ? all : 'connect-src' + rest + allow;
        });
      }
      return csp.replace(/;?\s*$/, '; connect-src' + allow + ';');
    }

    function injectTranslateCsp(html) {
      if (typeof html !== 'string' || html.indexOf('translate.googleapis.com') !== -1) return html;
      var meta = /(<meta\b[^>]*http-equiv=["']Content-Security-Policy["'][^>]*content=["'])([^"']*)(["'][^>]*>)/i;
      if (meta.test(html)) {
        return html.replace(meta, function(_, before, csp, after) {
          return before + addTranslateConnectSrc(csp) + after;
        });
      }
      var tag = '<meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="connect-src https://translate.googleapis.com https://translate.google.com;">';
      if (/<head[^>]*>/i.test(html)) return html.replace(/<head[^>]*>/i, function(head) { return head + tag; });
      return tag + html;
    }

    function patchWebviewHtml(webview) {
      try {
        if (!webview || webview.__cfViHtmlPatched) return;
        webview.__cfViHtmlPatched = true;
        var owner = webview;
        var descriptor = null;
        while (owner && !descriptor) {
          descriptor = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(owner, 'html');
          owner = Object.getPrototypeOf(owner);
        }
        var storedHtml = '';
        Object.defineProperty(webview, 'html', {
          configurable: true,
          enumerable: true,
          get: function() {
            try { return descriptor && descriptor.get ? descriptor.get.call(webview) : storedHtml; } catch (_) { return storedHtml; }
          },
          set: function(value) {
            var next = injectTranslateCsp(value);
            if (descriptor && descriptor.set) return descriptor.set.call(webview, next);
            storedHtml = next;
          }
        });
        try {
          var current = descriptor && descriptor.get ? descriptor.get.call(webview) : storedHtml;
          if (current) webview.html = current;
        } catch (_) {}
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    function patchWebview(webview) {
      try {
        if (!webview) return;
        patchWebviewHtml(webview);
        if (typeof webview.onDidReceiveMessage !== 'function' || webview.__cfViLangPatched) return;
        webview.__cfViLangPatched = true;
        webview.onDidReceiveMessage(function(message) {
          try {
            if (!message || typeof message !== 'object') return;
            if (message.type === 'cursorFree:setLanguage' || message.command === 'cursorFree:setLanguage' || message.__cursorFreeLanguage) {
              setLanguageMode(message.language || message.lang || message.mode || message.__cursorFreeLanguage);
            }
          } catch (_) {}
        });
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    function wrapWebviewProvider(provider) {
      try {
        if (!provider || provider.__cfViProviderWrapped || typeof provider.resolveWebviewView !== 'function') return provider;
        var originalResolve = provider.resolveWebviewView;
        provider.resolveWebviewView = function(webviewView) {
          patchWebview(webviewView && webviewView.webview);
          var result = originalResolve.apply(this, arguments);
          if (result && typeof result.then === 'function') {
            return result.then(function(value) {
              patchWebview(webviewView && webviewView.webview);
              return value;
            });
          }
          patchWebview(webviewView && webviewView.webview);
          return result;
        };
        provider.__cfViProviderWrapped = true;
      } catch (_) {}
      return provider;
    }

    function wrapVscode(vscodeApi) {
      try {
        if (!vscodeApi || !vscodeApi.window || vscodeApi.__cfViHostWrapped) return vscodeApi;
        vscodeApi.__cfViHostWrapped = true;
        var windowApi = vscodeApi.window;

        var originalRegister = windowApi.registerWebviewViewProvider;
        if (typeof originalRegister === 'function' && !originalRegister.__cfViWrapped) {
          windowApi.registerWebviewViewProvider = function(viewId, provider, options) {
            return originalRegister.call(windowApi, viewId, wrapWebviewProvider(provider), options);
          };
          windowApi.registerWebviewViewProvider.__cfViWrapped = true;
        }

        var originalPanel = windowApi.createWebviewPanel;
        if (typeof originalPanel === 'function' && !originalPanel.__cfViWrapped) {
          windowApi.createWebviewPanel = function() {
            var panel = originalPanel.apply(windowApi, arguments);
            patchWebview(panel && panel.webview);
            return panel;
          };
          windowApi.createWebviewPanel.__cfViWrapped = true;
        }

          ['showWarningMessage', 'showInformationMessage', 'showErrorMessage'].forEach(function(fn) {
            var original = windowApi[fn];
            if (typeof original !== 'function' || original.__cfViWrapped) return;
            windowApi[fn] = function(message) {
              if (isVersionWarning(message)) return Promise.resolve(undefined);
              var rest = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments, 1);
              var tx = translateItems(rest);
              var result = original.apply(windowApi, [translateText(message)].concat(tx.mapped));
              if (result && typeof result.then === 'function') {
                var map = tx.map;
                var keys = Object.keys(map);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                  return result.then(function(value) {

    }

    function isVersionWarning(text) {
      text = String(text == null ? '' : text);
      if (/版本过低|Phiên bản.*quá thấp|Plugin version too low|版本不兼容|版本太低|版本过旧|cần.*cập.*nhật|needs? update|needs? upgrade|incompatible.version/i.test(text)) return true;
      if (/\d+[.]\d+[.]?\d*\s*.*(?:version|plugin|cursor|update|phiên bản)/i.test(text)) return true;
      if (/(?:version|plugin|cursor|phiên bản).*\d+[.]\d+[.]?\d*/i.test(text)) return true;
      if (/\b\d+[.]\d+\b/.test(text) && /(?:too low|incompatible|needs?|cập nhật|nâng cấp|quá thấp|không tương thích)/i.test(text)) return true;
      if (/\d+[.]\d+[.]?\d*/.test(text) && text.length < 200 && /version|cursor|plugin|update/i.test(text)) return true;
      return false;
    }

    function looksLikeChineseForceRule(text) {
      text = String(text == null ? '' : text);
      return /dùng\s+tiếng\s+trung/i.test(text) || /use\s+chinese/i.test(text) || /respond\s+in\s+chinese/i.test(text) || /使用中文|用中文回答|中文输出|请使用中文|只用中文/.test(text);

    function getMessageContent(msg) {

      if (Array.isArray(msg.content)) return msg.content.map(function(part) { return typeof part === 'string' ? part : (part && (part.text || part.content)) || ''; }).join('\n');

    function detectUserLanguage(messages) {
      var text = '';
      if (Array.isArray(messages)) {
        for (var i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          var msg = messages[i];
          if (msg && (msg.role === 'user' || msg.role === 'human')) {
            text = getMessageContent(msg);
            if (text) break;
          }
        }
      }
      if (hasVietnamese(text)) return 'vi';
      if (hasChinese(text)) return 'zh';
      if (hasEnglish(text)) return 'en';
      return 'vi';

    function buildFollowLanguageRule(lang) {
      var target = lang === 'zh' ? 'Chinese' : (lang === 'en' ? 'English' : 'Vietnamese');
      return FOLLOW_RULE_MARKER + '\nAlways respond in the same language the user is currently using in this conversation. Do not switch to Chinese unless the user is speaking Chinese. Current user language: ' + target + '.';
    }

    function sanitizeRules(list) {
      if (!Array.isArray(list)) return list;
      return list.filter(function(item) { return !looksLikeChineseForceRule(getMessageContent(item)); });
    }

    function sanitizeMessages(messages) {

      for (var i = 0; i < messages.length; i++) {

        cleaned.push(msg);
      }
      var exists = cleaned.some(function(msg) { return String(getMessageContent(msg)).indexOf(FOLLOW_RULE_MARKER) !== -1; });
      if (!exists) cleaned.unshift({ role: 'system', content: buildFollowLanguageRule(detectUserLanguage(cleaned)) });

    }

    function sanitizePayload(obj, depth) {

      }

      if (Array.isArray(obj.rules)) obj.rules = sanitizeRules(obj.rules);
      if (Array.isArray(obj.userRules)) obj.userRules = sanitizeRules(obj.userRules);
      if (Array.isArray(obj.instructions)) obj.instructions = sanitizeRules(obj.instructions);
      if (typeof obj.user_rule === 'string' && looksLikeChineseForceRule(obj.user_rule)) obj.user_rule = '';
      if (typeof obj.rule === 'string' && looksLikeChineseForceRule(obj.rule)) obj.rule = '';
      if (typeof obj.instruction === 'string' && looksLikeChineseForceRule(obj.instruction)) obj.instruction = '';
      for (var key in obj) if (obj[key] && typeof obj[key] === 'object') sanitizePayload(obj[key], depth + 1);
      return obj;
    }

    function mutateBody(body) {

    function patchFetch() {

    function patchRequestModule(mod) {
